languageFooter: The interface language is saved on this Mac.
loadCoversFooter: When disabled, ManicStage only reads the index and song metadata. Covers are not copied, so large libraries open faster.
transcodeSubtitle: Files already compatible with the S series are kept as-is. This strategy only applies to unsupported formats or newer features added after these Walkman models were released.
aalNote: ATRAC Advanced Lossless / AAL is Sony's closed lossless format. ManicStage cannot create or transcode to AAL.
trackLimitNote: The S705 library supports up to 511 songs. ManicStage blocks sync before this limit is exceeded.

strategyDescriptions.auto: Keep compatible files as-is; unsupported sources become LAME MP3 V0 or V2 based on source quality.
strategyDescriptions.lossless: Keep compatible MP3; keep supported WAV as WAV; convert unsupported lossless sources to WAV 44.1kHz / 16-bit / stereo.
strategyDescriptions.quality: For lossless or high-spec sources, convert to LAME MP3 320kbps CBR / Joint Stereo / 44.1kHz.
strategyDescriptions.strongValue: Avoid large WAV files and use LAME MP3 V0 as the best high-quality lossy choice for S705.
strategyDescriptions.value: For large imports, use LAME MP3 V2 to prioritize capacity.

strategyTableRows: High-quality source to V0; low-quality source to V2
supportText: ← If ManicStage helped bring your old Walkman back into use, or if you appreciate this little project, you can support it via the QR codes on the left. Any contribution is appreciated.
supportEnglishText: ← 如果 ManicStage 帮你重新用起了一台老 Walkman，或者你认可这件小作品，可以通过左侧二维码支持。任何支持都很感谢。
contactText: For device stories, feedback, logs, or a friendly chat, you can reach me here.
contactEnglishText: 如果想交流设备、反馈问题，或者只是分享一台老播放器的故事，也可以通过下面的方式找到我。
wechatHint: The QR code is for contact, not payment.

ui.librarySubtitle: Showing the cached library from the current player
ui.libraryDetailSubtitle: Right-click a song to create a delete task
ui.libraryEmptyMessage: Connect the S705 and click Detect Device, or initialize an empty library from Device Info.
ui.tasksSubtitle: Delete tasks run first, then import tasks
ui.statusNoSupportedDevice: No supported Sony Walkman device detected
ui.statusInitAvailable: Empty external disk found. You can initialize an empty library.
ui.ffmpegDescription: ManicStage does not bundle FFmpeg. Install Homebrew FFmpeg and choose the ffmpeg file or its bin folder when transcoding or cover generation is needed.

freeFeatureText: All ManicStage features are free. Support is entirely optional.
